summary: Completed testing of Iteration 12 - Three Bug Fixes: 1) History tab descending order, 2) Close date auto-select, 3) Min date validation. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/accounts/{id}/landed rejects entry date before opening_date (400)
Backend: POST /api/accounts/{id}/received rejects entry date before opening_date (400)
Backend: POST /api/accounts/{id}/landed accepts valid date (on or after opening date, not future)
Backend: Account has close_history and reopen_history arrays
Backend: History events can be sorted chronologically (descending)
Backend: Close account endpoint creates history entry with today's date
Backend: Reopen account endpoint works correctly
Backend: Account detail endpoint returns all required fields
UI: History tab shows events in descending chronological order (newest first)
UI: History tab interleaves close and reopen events properly (not grouped by type)
UI: Close Account modal shows today's date as disabled/non-editable field
UI: Close Account modal shows 'Close date is automatically set to today' note
UI: Landed entry date picker has min={opening_date} (2026-03-01)
UI: Landed entry date picker has max={today} (2026-03-21)
UI: Received entry date picker has min={opening_date} (2026-03-01)
UI: Received entry date picker has max={today} (2026-03-21)

history_tab_descending_order.details: History tab shows events in descending chronological order (newest first). Found 7 history events with both 'Account Closed' and 'Account Reopened' events interleaved properly.

close_date_auto_select.details: Close Account modal shows today's date (21 Mar 2026) in a disabled input field. Note text 'Close date is automatically set to today' is displayed below the field.

min_date_validation_backend.details: Backend correctly rejects landed/received entries with dates before account opening date (returns 400 with error message). Also rejects future dates.

min_date_validation_frontend.details: Frontend date pickers have min={opening_date} and max={today} attributes. For ACC000039 (opening_date: 2026-03-01), landed and received date pickers have min='2026-03-01' and max='2026-03-21'.

reopen_functionality.details: Reopen account endpoint works correctly. Creates reopen_history entry with reason.

critical_code_review_comments: AccountDetailPage.js line 141: historyEvents.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date) - new Date(a.date)) - correctly sorts descending
AccountDetailPage.js lines 509-512: Close date input is disabled with today's date and note text
AccountFormPage.js lines 612-614: Landed date picker has min={formData.opening_date} max={today}
AccountFormPage.js lines 690-693: Received date picker has min={formData.opening_date} max={today}
Backend routes/accounts.py lines 313-320: Validates landed entry date >= opening_date and <= today
Backend routes/accounts.py lines 348-355: Validates received entry date >= opening_date and <= today
seed_data_creation: Used existing accounts: 69bebeac0390ebf9b7d0ae1e (ACC000039 with opening_date 2026-03-01), 69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72 (ACC000045 with close/reopen history)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 12 bug fixes verified. Key changes: 1) History tab sorts events descending by date (newest first). 2) Close Account modal has disabled date field showing today's date with note. 3) Landed/Received date pickers have min={opening_date} and max={today}. 4) Backend validates entry dates are >= opening_date and <= today. Test accounts: ACC000039 (69bebeac0390ebf9b7d0ae1e) for date validation, ACC000045 (69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72) for history.
